title: Lenvatinib plus pembrolizumab versus standard of care in recurrent/metastatic head and neck squamous cell carcinoma: Randomized, phase 2 LEAP-009 trial.
abstract: Safe and effective treatment options are needed for patients with recurrent/metastatic (R/M) head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) that has progressed after first-line platinum-based therapy and a PD-(L)1 inhibitor. We present results from the phase 2 LEAP-009 study (NCT04428151) of lenvatinib-pembrolizumab versus standard of care (SOC) or lenvatinib monotherapy in R/M HNSCC.
trial_name: Platinum-Based Chemotherapy plus Cetuximab in Head and Neck Cancer
